name: Freehead Skate
description: Freehead Skateis a fast-paced, arcade-style game that challenges players to jump over obstacles using only their characters head. With simple controls and addictive gameplay, players must time their head-jumps perfectly to conquer increasingly challenging levels and achieve high scores. Dive into the exciting world of Freehead Skateand put your head-jumping skills to the test! on R1Games.com
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Action, Fun, Games, Highscore, HTML5, jump, Jumping, Kids, Obstacle, Play
